title: cytisus arboreus subsp. macranthus
intro: Cytisus arboreus subsp. macranthus, also known as the tree broom or French broom, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Cytisus arboreus subsp. macranthus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, although its usage should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
